site.name: InBrowser.App
site.description: In-browser utilities that run without a backend server.
site.tagline: A browser-native utility atlas for the Astro rewrite.
site.footerNote: The shell is no longer empty: the first text, validator, and file tools now exercise the generated registry end to end.

metadata.homeDescription: The Astro rewrite now supports localized routes, metadata, and content loading.
metadata.toolsDescription: Browse the generated tool directory and the Astro rewrite's localization model.

home.title: The rewrite has moved from shell work to real tool migrations.
home.description: The first three archetypes are now live inside the Astro rewrite: a text converter, a validator, and a file-processing tool, all wired through the same multilingual contract.
home.toolCountDetail: Migrated tools currently visible through the generated registry.
home.searchCountDetail: Localized search entries generated from the first migrated tool set.
home.principlesTitle: The shell should explain itself before it sells itself.
home.principlesDescription: The home page now focuses on three durable ideas: generated structure, multilingual content, and a calmer browser-first experience.
home.registryDescription: Routes, search records, and sitemap entries come from manifests instead of hand-maintained wiring.
home.localeDescription: Short labels live in JSON, long-form context lives in MDX, and both resolve through the same fallback model.
home.shellDescription: Navigation, language switching, and search are now stable site surfaces instead of scattered page affordances.
home.contentTitle: How the shell is being staged
home.contentDescription: This page now tracks how the rewrite moved from contract work into actual tool delivery.
home.sidebarDescription: Issue #322 proves the contract with real tools. The next milestone is expanding that pattern into more families and collection pages.

tools.title: A generated directory that now points to real migrated tools.
tools.description: Search runs against localized metadata, and the first migrated tools already render their own Astro entrypoints and React islands without any hand-written route registry.
tools.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, description, tag, or category
tools.searchHint: The query is kept in the URL and filtered against generated metadata for the active locale.
tools.resultsDescription: The generated index is now backed by live tool pages, not just placeholder contracts.
tools.emptyRegistryTitle: No tools have been migrated into this shell yet.
tools.emptyRegistryDescription: As soon as a tool ships a manifest, localized assets, and a page entrypoint, it will appear here automatically.
tools.emptySearchTitle: No tools match this query yet.
tools.emptySearchDescription: Try a broader term or clear the search to return to the full generated directory.
tools.contentDescription: Tool detail pages now inherit the same language model, metadata rules, and generated paths while still owning their own page entrypoints.
tools.sidebarDescription: Search is no longer a page-specific widget. It is a stable shell feature backed by the same generated contract that drives real tool pages.

tool.clientMissing: This tool does not register a client island yet.
tool.contentMissing: This tool does not ship long-form content yet.
